meta.title: Bool Pool - Play 8-Ball and Brazilian Pool Online
meta.description: The most addictive pool game in Brazil. Millions of players, daily tournaments and real prizes!

game.rotateInstructions: For a better experience, play in landscape mode
game.ballInHand: BALL IN HAND — Tap to place
game.breakShot: BREAK — Place behind the head string
game.exitWarning: Your progress in this match will be lost.
game.exitPenaltyDesc: Leaving before the match ends counts as a loss and may deduct coins.
game.quitConsequence: If you leave now, you will lose the match.
game.quitConsequencePenalty: If you leave now, you will lose the match and receive a penalty.
game.foulNoRed: Foul! Didn't hit the red ball

beginner.name: Beginner Cue
beginner.desc: The basic cue to start your journey

fire.name: Fire Storm
fire.desc: The power of fire in your hands

ice.name: Ice Queen
ice.desc: Coldness and precision in every move

shadow.name: Shadow Assassin
shadow.desc: Invisible until the moment of impact

8ball.name: London
8ball.subtitle: Classic 8-Ball
8ball.desc: Classic billiard rules. Solids vs Stripes. Scratch the 8 and you lose!

8ball_vegas.name: Las Vegas
8ball_vegas.subtitle: 8-Ball High Stakes
8ball_vegas.desc: High stakes, bigger rewards. Are you feeling lucky?

sinuca.name: Rio de Janeiro
sinuca.subtitle: Brazilian Pool
sinuca.desc: The real Brazilian pool! Red ball, cue on white. Most points wins!

sinuca_carioca.name: Carioca Pro
sinuca_carioca.subtitle: Advanced Pool
sinuca_carioca.desc: For masters of Brazilian pool. Advanced rules and premium table.

snooker.name: London Pro
snooker.subtitle: Professional Snooker
snooker.desc: For masters only. Full-size table, numbered balls, maximum precision required.

snooker_champ.name: World Championship
snooker_champ.subtitle: Elite Snooker
snooker_champ.desc: The elite of world snooker. Only the best survive.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure? All data will be lost!

victoryBox.title: Victory Boxes
victoryBox.emptyDesc: Win matches to earn boxes with rewards!
victoryBox.slotsFull: Slots full! Open or accelerate a box to earn more.
